overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Gryffindor student exploring the castle interior. The character moves through a tapestry-adorned common room, corridors, and grand staircases, transitioning from cozy wooden-paneled areas to stone tower architecture. Other students appear in the main hall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tower common room with hanging chandelier

events.description: character approaches and opens the wooden lattice door to exit the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the furnished tower room toward the exit door, passing armchairs and a globe

entered.detail: large circular iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from chains
red and gold heraldic tapestries covering the stone walls
ornate wooden door with geometric lattice window panels

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an upper balcony overlooking a cozy common room dominated by a large iron chandelier. The room features medieval tapestries, a stone fireplace, and comfortable furniture. The character walks toward an ornate wooden lattice door and exits the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with tall arched windows

events.description: exits the common room into a long stone corridor with checkered flooring

agents.ego_description: walking down the stone corridor with tall windows on the right side

entered.detail: grey stone block walls with vertical architectural details
tall gothic arched windows letting in bright natural light
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone corridor with checkered marble flooring. Tall arched windows on the right wall flood the space with natural morning light. The walls transition from stone to wood paneling as the character approaches the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with wooden paneling and portrait gallery

events.description: enters the grand hall with sweeping wooden staircase and balcony
character pauses to look down over the balcony railing at the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony, looking down at the grand staircase and lower hall

entered.detail: sweeping double staircase with ornate wooden railings and balusters
elegant multi-tiered chandelier with candle-style lights
series of framed oil paintings in gold frames along the wood-paneled wall
carved wooden balustrade overlooking the lower floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent grand hall with high ceilings and rich wooden paneling. A crystal chandelier hangs above the sweeping double staircase. The character walks along the upper balcony, pausing to look down at the lower level before continuing around the gallery lined with portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: main entrance hall with notice boards and student gathering area

events.description: begins descending the grand staircase toward the main floor
other students in robes become visible on the main floor

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand staircase toward the main hall where other students are gathered near a large portrait

notable_agents.action: student in black robes standing near the staircase railing
student kneeling before a large portrait on the wall

entered.detail: large wooden board covered with papers and notices
prominent oval-framed portrait of a figure in historical dress
long red carpet running up the center of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character descends the grand staircase into the main hall, passing red carpet runners. The hall opens into a larger space with notice boards and tall windows. Other students in Hogwarts robes are visible standing and interacting near a large oval portrait at the far end of the hall.

events.description: turns and begins ascending the opposite staircase toward the stone tower
enters the stone tower area with gothic architecture and spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the staircase and entering the stone tower corridor with arched windows

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with carved balustrade ascending the tower
pointed arch doorway with heavy wooden doors
iron lantern suspended from the ceiling of the tower

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a secondary staircase away from the main hall, transitioning from wood-paneled walls back to bare stone architecture. The environment shifts to a more austere stone tower with a spiral staircase, gothic arches, and narrow windows characteristic of the castle's older sections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the cozy, tapestry-lined warmth of a student common room into the grand scale of the castle's central halls and finally into its austere stone towers. It begins on an upper balcony overlooking a room with a large iron chandelier and a stone fireplace, moving through an ornate wooden lattice door into a narrow stone corridor. As the camera progresses, the checkered marble flooring and morning light from arched windows give way to a magnificent grand hall featuring a crystal chandelier and a sweeping double staircase. The scene then expands as the character descends red-carpeted stairs into a bustling main hall filled with students and large portraits before turning away from the crowd. Finally, the environment shifts from rich wood paneling back to bare stone as the camera ascends a spiral staircase into a gothic tower characterized by narrow windows and austere architecture.
